prompt: Add Redis caching to the GetUser handler in handlers.go. Look up how to use go-redis v9.

turns.content:
<task>
Add Redis caching to the GetUser handler in handlers.go. Look up how to use go-redis v9.
</task>

1	package main
   2	
   3	import (
   4		"encoding/json"
   5		"net/http"
   6	)
   7	
   8	func GetUser(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
   9		id := r.URL.Query().Get("id")
  10		user, err := fetchUserFromDB(id)
  11		if err != nil {
  12			http.Error(w, "not found", 404)
  13			return
  14		}
  15		json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(user)
  16	}

arguments.query: go-redis v9 get set example golang context

turns.content:
1. [go-redis docs] Getting started
   URL: https://redis.uptrace.dev/guide/go-redis.html
   Snippet: import "github.com/redis/go-redis/v9". rdb := redis.NewClient(&redis.Options{Addr: "localhost:6379"}). val, err := rdb.Get(ctx, key).Result(). rdb.Set(ctx, key, val, 5*time.Minute)

2. [GitHub] go-redis examples
   URL: https://github.com/redis/go-redis
   Snippet: if err == redis.Nil { /* cache miss */ } else if err != nil { /* real error */ }

arguments.note: go-redis v9: import github.com/redis/go-redis/v9. NewClient(&Options{Addr: ...}). Get(ctx, key).Result() returns (string, error). Set(ctx, key, val, ttl). Check redis.Nil for cache miss.

arguments.summary: Read handlers.go — GetUser fetches from DB directly. Researched go-redis v9: Get/Set with context, check redis.Nil for cache miss, 5min TTL.

next_steps.description: Add redis import and cache client var to handlers.go imports
Add cache check before DB call and cache write after DB call in GetUser
Run go build to verify compilation

arguments.summary: Added redis import and client var to handlers.go.

next_steps.description: Add cache-check-then-DB pattern to GetUser: try redis Get, on miss fetch from DB and Set with 5min TTL

arguments.summary: Added cache-aside pattern to GetUser: try redis Get first, on miss fetch from DB and Set with 5min TTL. go build passes.
arguments.final_answer:
Added Redis caching to `GetUser` using go-redis v9:
1. Cache check: `rdb.Get(ctx, "user:"+id)` — returns cached JSON on hit
2. Cache miss: fetches from DB, marshals to JSON, stores with `rdb.Set(..., 5*time.Minute)`
3. Added `github.com/redis/go-redis/v9` import and client initialization
